name: Ursula leather handbag Louis Vuitton Multicolour in Leather
original_description: Gorgeous Louis Vuitton Murakami Ursula multicolor from 2003 in excellent vintage condition, designed by Marc Jacobs 🤍 Comes with original dustbag, this vintage LV Murakami Ursula has aged very well with a beautiful patina on the Vachetta leather. It has a cherry maroon interior in perfect condition with 2 pockets & 2 compartments and shiny gold chunky hardware Minimal wear, some scratches on hardware, check photos carefully 💛 Answering questions in comments 💌 Answering questions in comments
